content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/filters.py
summary: Implemented case_sensitive=False kwarg on sync_do_groupby/do_groupby: expr = make_attrgetter(environment, attribute, postprocess=ignore_case if not case_sensitive else None, default=default); build out list as before, then if not case_sensitive remap each _GroupTuple key to output_expr(values[0]) (real-case attrgetter with no postprocess) so output preserves original casing. This is a separate keyword-only-in-practice param after default, added before your with_counts - please add with_counts as the next param after case_sensitive and wrap the final 'out' list construction (don't overwrite my ignore_case/output_expr logic).

fields.summary: Implemented case_sensitive=False kwarg on sync_do_groupby/do_groupby: expr = make_attrgetter(environment, attribute, postprocess=ignore_case if not case_sensitive else None, default=default); build out list as before, then if not case_sensitive remap each _GroupTuple key to output_expr(values[0]) (real-case attrgetter with no postprocess) so output preserves original casing. This is a separate keyword-only-in-practice param after default, added before your with_counts - please add with_counts as the next param after case_sensitive and wrap the final 'out' list construction (don't overwrite my ignore_case/output_expr logic).
